debug_info.goal:
V : Type u_1
P : Type u_2
inst✝⁴ : NormedAddCommGroup V
inst✝³ : InnerProductSpace ℝ V
inst✝² : MetricSpace P
inst✝¹ : NormedAddTorsor V P
inst✝ : Fact (finrank ℝ V = 2)
A B C D E F X O₁ O₂ : P
affineIndependent_ABC : AffineIndependent ℝ ![A, B, C]
acuteAngled_ABC : { points := ![A, B, C], independent := affineIndependent_ABC }.AcuteAngled
AC_lt_AB : dist A C < dist A B
D_mem_interior_ABC : D ∈ { points := ![A, B, C], independent := affineIndependent_ABC }.interior
angle_DAB_eq_angle_CAD : EuclideanGeometry.angle D A B = EuclideanGeometry.angle C A D
wbtw_A_E_C : Wbtw ℝ A E C
angle_ADE_eq_angle_BCD : EuclideanGeometry.angle A D E = EuclideanGeometry.angle B C D
wbtw_A_F_B : Wbtw ℝ A F B
angle_FDA_eq_angle_DBC : EuclideanGeometry.angle F D A = EuclideanGeometry.angle D B C
X_mem_AC : X ∈ affineSpan ℝ {A, C}
CX_eq_BX : dist C X = dist B X
affineIndependent_ADC : AffineIndependent ℝ ![A, D, C]
O₁_eq_circumcenter_ADC : O₁ = { points := ![A, D, C], independent := affineIndependent_ADC }.circumcenter
affineIndependent_EXD : AffineIndependent ℝ ![E, X, D]
O₂_eq_circumcenter_EXD : O₂ = { points := ![E, X, D], independent := affineIndependent_EXD }.circumcenter
⊢ E ≠ F ∧ O₁ ≠ O₂ ∧ (↑(affineSpan ℝ {B, C}) ∩ ↑(affineSpan ℝ {E, F}) ∩ ↑(affineSpan ℝ {O₁, O₂})).Nonempty
